Servlet/RegistrationForm/pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with Java 21.
Switch from separate source/target configuration to the unified release flag for Java 21.
Servlet/RegistrationForm/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in favor of 'release' in newer compiler plugin versions; using 'release' ensures correct class file version and API usage checks for Java 21.
